creator: barner@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Libwhisker 2.x is not backwards compatible with libwhisker 1.x 
unless you install a compatiblity module. Could you please 
change the port to install this module (and change the plist 
accordingly). 

We also need an entry for ports/UPDATING which should point 
to the migration guide at 
http://www.wiretrip.net/rfp/libwhisker/README2 

Thanks, 
Simon
